element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Managing distance and boundaries during combat
Learning varied opponent behavior and countering
Final opponents with superior AI and patterns

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based rhythm with escalating intensity as tournament progresses; each bout culminates in clear win/loss outcome providing natural pacing breaks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches feature weak AI opponents with limited move variety; player learns basic combat mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponents gain improved AI patterns, faster response times, and expanded move sets; special moves become necessary
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship matches present opponents with advanced AI, punishing combos, and frequent special move usage
notable_spikes: Transition from early to mid-tournament opponents
Final championship match against end-boss opponent with superior pattern complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear sequence of opponent matches escalating in difficulty; each victory advances player toward championship; clear hierarchical opponent ranking
Isolated single-opponent battle in contained ring space; focus on head-to-head combat mechanics without environmental variables
